title: 'Godman' Kharat faces 8 FIRs, including of rape; SIT probing role of officials, aides: Fadnavis
description: Maharashtra CM Fadnavis said another complaint was filed on February 18, 2026, in Shirdi in Ahilyanagar district, where a woman alleged that one Neeraj Jadhav had created and shared an AI-generated image of her and threatened to make it viral.
